# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
    location: '<location>' # Required, specify the Azure region where your resources will be created (e.g., West Europe) 
    accountNamePrefix: '<account-name-prefix>' # Optional - default is to use resource group name as prefix for storage accounts and blob containers if not provided here  
resources:
# Create a Storage Account with the specified location, unique names will be created using this format. Useful when you want your resources in different regions or have multiple environments 
- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  name: '{1}' # Required - use {0} to provide resource group and prefix for storage accounts if not provided here  
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01' # Use the correct API version based on your subscription type (current is "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts")   
  location: '{location}'    
  properties: {}     
# Create a Blob Container for static website hosting in Storage Account and set access level to anonymous read  
- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts//providers/microsoft.insights/blobcontainers # Required - use {0} as the resource group, then provide your container name here  (e.g., mystorageaccountcontainer)   
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'    
  dependsOn: ['{parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix')}{1}-sa'] # Required - use {0} as the storage account resource group, then provide your container name here (e.g., mystorageaccountcontainer)   
  location: '{location}'  
  properties: {}
